texto: With 'GoldenEye,' the franchise got locked into this legal fight. They couldn't make new Bond movies for about seven years. It was my first huge production. I figured if I did at least a yeoman-like job, it would be greeted as a complete revival of the series.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Martin Campbell: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a trabalho. O trecho “With 'GoldenEye,' the franchise got locked into this legal fight. They couldn't make new Bond mov…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, job, fight pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de fight e movies.

frase_original: With 'GoldenEye,' the franchise got locked into this legal fight. They couldn't make new Bond movies for about seven years. It was my first huge production. I figured if I did at least a yeoman-like job, it would be greeted as a complete revival of the series.
